text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I'm in the middle of watching some<n>Umamusume
train when Hishi<n>Amazon calls out to me.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hey, you! Have you seen Sky?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Huh... She's gone AWOL in the middle<n>of her
extra classes again.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
As the leader of Miho Dorm, I figured<n>I should
scold her good and set her<n>straight.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, there she is! Now I just gotta<n>figure out
how to nab her...
choice_data_list: Surround her from all sides and trap her.
Lure her out to the track.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I tell Hishi Amazon that it would be<n>more
effective to approach her from<n>the sides rather
than going after her<n>head-on.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
You're right. I'll get some of my<n>residents to help
me catch that<n>slippery little sucker!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Raaaaah! There's no slackin' off on<n>Hishiama's
watch!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky appears to have anticipated<n>the trap,
but she admits defeat after<n>getting boxed in by a
multi-layered<n>wall of Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
It looks like this served as not only a<n>good
punishment for Seiun Sky, but an<n>effective
training activity in its own<n>right.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I suggest luring Seiun Sky to the track<n>so that
chasing her eventually ends up<n>as a form of
training through partner<n>running.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hm, so I don't necessarily have to<n>catch her,
huh? All right, I'm in!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The two of them play cat-and-mouse<n>for a while,
until Seiun Sky realizes to<n>her horror that she's
been totally<n>duped.
